ham.subject: Scheduled Corporate VPN Maintenance – 12:30 AM – 2:30 AM IST
ham.body:
Hello Team,

Please be advised that our corporate VPN will undergo scheduled maintenance on Monday, 20th April 2026 from 12:30 AM to 2:30 AM IST. During this period, all VPN connections will be temporarily unavailable. If you need to access any critical resources, please coordinate with the IT helpdesk.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Regards,
Rajesh Kumar
IT Operations

spam.subject: URGENT: Microsoft 365 Password Expiry – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear User,

This is an official notice from Microsoft Security Team. Your Microsoft 365 account password is set to expire in the next 24 hours. If you do not update your password within this window, your access to email, OneDrive, SharePoint and other corporate services will be permanently suspended.

Please click <URL> and follow the instructions to reset your password immediately. If you have already updated your password, kindly disregard this message.

For any assistance, contact the helpdesk at 1800-123-456.

Thank you for your prompt action.

Regards,
Microsoft Security Team
